message:
chore(logging): remove outdated comment about phase number formatting

The previous commit added dynamic padding that works for any phase count,
making this assumption-note obsolete.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -182,7 +182,6 @@ fi
 
 # Show installation completion message
 # Usage: show_completion $total_phases $total_seconds
-# NOTE: Phases line assumes single-digit phase numbers (1-9). ACFS has 9 phases.
 if ! declare -f show_completion >/dev/null; then
     show_completion() {
         local total="$1"
